issues.description: API Contract specifies POST /api/auth/register should return 400 for weak password, but Pydantic validation returns 422 for min_length violations before custom validation runs.
issues.suggestion: Either accept 422 as valid response for validation errors (standard FastAPI behavior), or implement custom middleware to convert 422 to 400 for password validation errors.

issues.description: Passlib has compatibility issues with bcrypt>=4.1.0 on Python 3.12. The bcrypt package version must be pinned to 4.0.1.
issues.suggestion: Consider using bcrypt directly instead of passlib, or pin bcrypt==4.0.1 in requirements.txt.

issues.description: datetime.utcnow() is deprecated in Python 3.12 and will be removed in future versions.
issues.suggestion: Replace with datetime.now(datetime.UTC) for timezone-aware datetimes.

issues.description: Token blacklist uses in-memory set which will be lost on server restart. This means logged-out tokens become valid again.
issues.suggestion: Use Redis or database table for token blacklist in production, or use short-lived access tokens (30 min) as mitigation.

issues.description: SECRET_KEY is hardcoded in security.py. This is a security risk if committed to version control.
